message.content:
@startuml
' Define custom styles to match the original diagram's appearance
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<aggregate>> LightYellow
    BorderThickness 2
}
skinparam class {
    AttributeFontName Courier New
    FontSize 10
    StereotypeFontSize 8
    Padding 5
}
hide circle

package "ProductOrder" <<aggregate>> #LightGreen/LineBlack{
    [TotalPriceWithoutVAT] as TPW_Vat_C [[C]] 
    [TotalVolume] as TVol_C [[C]]
    [BillingAddress] as BA_C [[C]]
    
    [OrderItem] as OI_E [[E]] 
    
    [Status] as S_C [[C]]
    [DeliveryAddress] as DA_C [[C]]
    
    [ProductOrder] as PO_E [[E]]
    [TotalPriceWithVAT] as TWP_Vat_C [[C]]
    [TotalWeight] as TWt_C [[C]]
}


note right of ProductOrder : This package represents an aggregate root for product orders.\nIt contains entities like OrderItem and value objects such\nas TotalPriceWithoutVAT, Status etc., which are part \nof this domain model. The relationships between these elements\ndefine how they interact within their context boundary defined by 'productorder'.
